sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94744" key="skeuoforei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκευοφορ-εῖον</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκευοφορ-φόριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n94744.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">yoke resting on the shoulders for carrying pails</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀνάφορον</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50</biblScope> </bibl> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">-φόριον</etym>): <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-φορεῖον</foreign> is prescribed by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">129</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
